query: SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(COLUMN_NAME ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION SEPARATOR ', ') as all_cols FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'game_monster_skill_catalog';
